zh.lifeSummary: Goffredo di TRICARICO於1155年之前與Mrs Goffredo de Tricarico在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1188年。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Goffredo di TRICARICO于1155年之前与Mrs Goffredo de Tricarico在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1188年。

nameMeanings.name: TRICARICO
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Vito, Donato, Angelo, Carlo, Gilda, Mauro, Pasquale, Sal, Santo, Serafino.
Italian (southern): habitational name from Tricarico in Matera province, named after the Latin personal name Tricarius.

nameMeanings.name: Goffredo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: di
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Diana   and   Diane .

variants.name: Diana
meanings: Name borne in Roman mythology by the goddess of the moon and of hunting, equivalent to the Greek Artemis. In mythology she is characterized as both beautiful and chaste. Her name is of ancient and uncertain derivation. It probably contains a first element that is also found in the name of the Greek god Dionysos ( see Dennis ) and the Latin name of the supreme god Jupiter. It was adopted in Britain during the Tudor period as a learned name, a borrowing from Latin influenced by the French form Diane . Although it was much used by Elizabethan poets celebrating the virgin goddess and alluding to the Virgin Queen, it was not particularly popular as a given name until the end of the 19th century. In earlier centuries some clergymen were reluctant to baptize girls with this pagan name, mindful of the riots against St Paul stirred up by worshippers of Diana of the Ephesians (Acts 19:24–41). In the late 20th century, its popularity received a boost because of its association with the late Diana , Princess of Wales ( 1961–97 ), who was renowned for her beauty, glamour, and compassion.

variants.name: Diane
meanings: form of   Diana  , now also widely used in the English-speaking world. It was especially popular among the Renaissance aristocracy, who loved hunting and were therefore proud to name their daughters after the classical goddess of the chase.

en.lifeSummary: Goffredo di TRICARICO married Mrs Goffredo de Tricarico before 1155, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1188.

fr.lifeSummary: Goffredo di TRICARICO a épousé Mrs Goffredo de Tricarico avant 1155, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1188.

de.lifeSummary: Goffredo di TRICARICO hat vor 1155 in Europa Mrs Goffredo de Tricarico geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1188.

it.lifeSummary: Goffredo di TRICARICO lui sposato Mrs Goffredo de Tricarico prima del 1155, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1188.

ja.lifeSummary: Goffredo di TRICARICOは1155年以前にヨーロッパでMrs Goffredo de Tricaricoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1188年に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Goffredo di TRICARICO(은)는 1155년 이전 우럽에서 Mrs Goffredo de Tricarico(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1188년 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Goffredo di TRICARICO casou-se com Mrs Goffredo de Tricarico antes 1155, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1188.

ru.lifeSummary: Goffredo di TRICARICO женился на женщине по имени Mrs Goffredo de Tricarico перед 1155 г. в местности Европа. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1188 г.

es.lifeSummary: Goffredo di TRICARICO se casó con Mrs Goffredo de Tricarico antes de 1155, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1188.
